text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm on my way to the track for<n>training, when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hup... Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uuugh, I can't reach it...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heya, Rice! What's got you jumping<n>around?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, my handkerchief flew off in the<n>wind, and
now it's caught on a tree<n>branch.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I getcha. Thought you were getting<n>some
jump rope practice in or<n>something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't had much luck<n>jumping... I'd be
able to reach if only<n>I were a little taller...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, listen here! The Rice I know<n>isn't someone
who whines about her<n>size.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've had my eye on you, pardner...<n>You kept on
losing, yet you still<n>continued to race.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're always facing your goals<n>head-on! That
unwavering<n>persistence of yours is a strength!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don't give up! Jump and grab that<n>handkerchief!
Grab your dreams!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yes... You're right! I'm gonna keep at<n>it no matter
what!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower jumps with all her might,<n>over and
over again, until finally...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I got it?! I did it! I got the<n>handkerchief!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was impressive! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy for you, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hweh?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, a crowd<n>assembles to
shower Rice Shower in<n>praise.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think, Rice? Your efforts<n>have touched
everyone here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The will to not give up... The courage<n>to keep
fighting! You're the best<n>Umamusume the
world's ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I'm not sure what you mean,<n>but if
everyone's happy, I guess I am<n>too.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now, I'll take that<n>handkerchief off ya!
I'm tacking on<n>an extra fifty centimeters for your
next challenge!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whaa?! But it took me ages justto get it once!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The importance of continuing to strive<n>toward
your goals... It's a message<n>that works just as
well for trainers.
